summary: Classified the five open PR inventory refs independently. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive items were detected, and no close, merge, fix, or label mutation is safe from this shard. Each PR should remain open for normal maintainer review or proof follow-up.

actions.reason: Open contributor PR with a focused Codex timeout-cleanup patch but missing behavior proof/rebase follow-up. It is not closeable as duplicate, superseded, fixed by candidate, or low-signal under this job.
Useful independent contributor PR with proof and maintainer scope discussion. It should remain open for maintainer review rather than be closed or merged by this inventory shard.
Independent session-state/message-delivery PR with proof and elevated merge risk. It is not a duplicate or low-signal candidate; keep it open for maintainer review.
Independent media/provider discovery PR with proof but conflict/dirty mergeability signal. It should remain open for maintainer or branch-repair follow-up outside this no-fix inventory shard.
Independent CLI performance PR with proof and maintainer-review status. It is not duplicate, superseded, or low-signal from the hydrated evidence.
